hero_subtitle: Kang Chiao Students Photography Cooperative Organization
sec1_desc: Exploring and establishing campus imaging standards. By defining technical parameters and archiving workflows, we provide a stable technical reference for high-quality visual records.
sec2_desc: Integrating with the campus ecosystem. Leveraging our technical capabilities, we establish stable visual support networks with various student organizations.
sec3_desc: Relying on the Supabase-powered KSVG UIA platform, we offer unified access credentials for our members and collaborating parties, and all digital assets architectures are open source for reference.
news_desc: Discover the latest global imaging tech and industry news.
